title: Add Date Range Filters to Admin Orders API
description:
Add date_from and date_to query parameters to GET /api/v1/admin/orders endpoint for filtering orders by creation date.

Currently frontend has date filter UI (Today, This Week, This Month, All Time) but backend doesn't accept date parameters.

Required:
1. Add date_from and date_to optional query parameters to GET /admin/orders endpoint
2. Update OrderRepository.list_all() to filter by created_at date range
3. Frontend already sends date filter, need to implement backend logic

Implementation:
- Parameters: date_from: Optional[date], date_to: Optional[date]
- Filter: WHERE created_at >= date_from AND created_at < date_to + 1 day
- If only date_from: filter >= date_from
- If only date_to: filter <= date_to end of day
- Both parameters optional
acceptance_criteria: GET /admin/orders accepts date_from and date_to query params
OrderRepository filters by created_at date range
Empty date params return all orders
